recipes.title: Grilled Chicken Caesar Salad
recipes.description: A crisp Caesar salad with grilled chicken, shaved parmesan, and a bright creamy dressing.
instructions: Season the chicken with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Grill over medium-high heat until cooked through, then rest and slice.
Toss the romaine with dressing in a large bowl.
Top with sliced chicken, parmesan, and croutons.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Creamy Pasta Carbonara
recipes.description: An easy carbonara with crispy pancetta, eggs, pecorino, and lots of black pepper.
instructions: Cook the spaghetti in well-salted water.
Render the pancetta in a skillet until crisp.
Whisk eggs, cheese, and pepper in a bowl.
Toss the hot pasta with pancetta, then add the egg mixture off the heat.
Loosen with pasta water until silky, then serve.

recipes.title: Thai Green Curry
recipes.description: Fragrant green curry with chicken, coconut milk, bamboo shoots, and Thai basil.
instructions: Cook the rice according to package directions.
Fry the curry paste in a little coconut cream until fragrant.
Add the chicken and cook until lightly browned.
Pour in the remaining coconut milk and simmer with bamboo shoots.
Finish with Thai basil and serve over rice.

recipes.title: Overnight Oats with Berries
recipes.description: No-cook overnight oats layered with berries, yogurt, honey, and vanilla.
instructions: Stir together oats, milk, yogurt, and honey.
Top with berries and refrigerate overnight.
Serve chilled in the morning.

recipes.title: Black Bean Tacos
recipes.description: Fast vegetarian tacos with seasoned black beans, avocado, pico, and lime.
instructions: Warm the beans with cumin and chili powder.
Heat the tortillas until soft and lightly charred.
Slice the avocados and prep the toppings.
Assemble the tacos and serve with lime wedges.

recipes.title: Honey Garlic Salmon
recipes.description: Pan-seared salmon glazed in a sweet, savory honey garlic sauce with roasted vegetables.
instructions: Roast the vegetables until tender.
Whisk together honey, garlic, and soy sauce.
Sear the salmon until golden.
Add the glaze and spoon it over the salmon until glossy.
Serve with the roasted vegetables.

recipes.title: Vietnamese Pho recipe
recipes.description: Recipe video above. Experience the magic of one of the greatest soups in the world with this easy to follow traditional recipe! The depth of flavour in the broth will blow you away - it looks so clear and light but it's packed with flavour!

ingredients.name: 1kg / 2lb marrow bones ((leg, knuckle), cut to reveal marrow)
30g / 1 oz beef tenderloin, raw, very thinly sliced ((Note 4))

instructions: Heat a heavy based skillet over high heat (no oil) until smoking.
Place onion and ginger in pan cut side down. Cook for a few minutes until it's charred, then turn. Remove and set aside.
Toast Spices lightly in a dry skillet over medium high heat for 3 minutes.
Rinse bones & brisket then cover with water in large stock pot.
Boil for 5 minutes, then drain.
Rinse each bone and brisket under tap water.
Wipe pot clean, bring 3.5 litres / 3.75 quarts water to boil.
Add bones and brisket, onion, ginger, Spices
Add onion, ginger, Spices, sugar and salt - water should just barely cover everything.
Cover with lid, simmer 3 hours.
Remove brisket (should be fall-apart tender), cool then refrigerate for later.
Simmer remaining soup UNCOVERED for 40 minutes.
Strain broth into another pot, discard bones and spices. Should be about 2.5 litres / 2.65 quarts (10 cups), if loads more, reduce.
Add fish sauce, adjust salt and sugar if needed. Broth should be beefy, fragrant with spices, savoury and barely sweet.
Prepare rice noodles per packet, just prior to serving.
Place noodles in bowl. Top with raw beef and brisket.
Ladle over about 400 / 14 oz hot broth - will cook beef to medium rare.
Serve with Toppings on the side!

ingredients.name: 1kg / 2lb marrow bones ((leg, knuckle), cut to reveal marrow)
30g / 1 oz beef tenderloin, raw, very thinly sliced ((Note 4))

r6:2026-04-02T01:34:44.299Z:4:is this hi.headline: High-Protein Dinner Fit
r6:2026-04-02T01:34:44.299Z:4:is this hi.answer: With 38g of protein per serving, this salmon dish covers nearly a third of your daily 130g target. It works perfectly as a post-workout recovery meal or a filling weeknight dinner.
watchouts: The honey glaze adds sugar, so track carbs if you are strictly cutting
Pair with a complex carb if you need extra fuel for heavy training days
Ensure your other daily meals balance out the remaining 92g of protein
r6:2026-04-02T01:34:44.299Z:4:is this hi.question: is this high enough in protein?
